hint.en: Enable this option to enhance the local device with features that are only available through the cloud api (like snapshots or light scenes). This requires a cloud api Key setup in the app settings. An App restart is necessary for the changes to become visible

label.en: Cloud API enhance this local device

hint.en: Enable this option to get additional slider components to interact with light and diy scenes. An App restart is necessary for the changes to become visible

Updated automatically on discovery. Override manually only if Homey and the Govee device are on different VLANs/subnets where multicast discovery fails — control packets will then be sent directly to this IP. Note: when used as a manual override, device state (brightness/color/on-off feedback) refreshes only on the next successful discovery cycle.

Mark this device as available immediately without waiting for local discovery. Use only when Homey and the Govee device are on different VLANs/subnets and multicast discovery cannot complete. Requires Last known IP to be set above. State feedback (current brightness/color/on-off) will not update — only commands are sent. An App restart is necessary for the changes to become visible.
